questions.question: Is the TipTap rich text editor correctly integrated with SSR safety (immediatelyRender: false)?
questions.actionable_check: Read NotesEditorClient.tsx and verify immediatelyRender: false in useEditor config
questions.pass_criteria: TipTap editor initializes without SSR hydration errors

questions.question: Does the toolbar provide bold, italic, H1, H2, UL, OL formatting controls with ARIA labels?
questions.actionable_check: Read NotesEditorClient.tsx toolbar section, verify all 6 buttons have aria-label
evidence_required: toolbar source showing all 6 buttons with aria-label attributes
questions.pass_criteria: 6 formatting controls with ARIA labels for accessibility

questions.question: Is autosave debounced at 500ms using a ref-based timer?
questions.actionable_check: Read NotesEditorClient.tsx DEBOUNCE_MS constant and useRef timer implementation
questions.pass_criteria: Debounced autosave implemented with 500ms delay via useRef

questions.question: Do notes persist in lp_progress_v1[slug].notesHtml after page refresh?
questions.actionable_check: E2E test 4 verifies persistence by typing, waiting 1s, refreshing, checking content
questions.pass_criteria: Notes content survives page refresh via localStorage

questions.question: Are notes stored per-topic independently (different slugs don't share notes)?
questions.actionable_check: E2E test 5 verifies JS topic notes don't appear in World History topic
questions.pass_criteria: Each topic has independent notes storage

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 5 Story 04 Playwright E2E tests pass?
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All notes editor E2E tests pass including toolbar, autosave, persistence, isolation

mandatory_questions.question: Does the notes editor load without runtime errors (no SSR hydration mismatch)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Click Notes tab in topic page, verify no runtime error overlay
evidence_required: E2E tests complete without unhandled runtime errors
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: Editor loads cleanly in development mode without TipTap SSR errors
